name: lifeos-ai
description: Local-first personal AI assistant for memory, mobile companion, remote access, and generated problem-solving tools.
author: LifeOS

scripts.desktop:pack: npm run desktop:resources:prepare && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:pack:unsigned: npm run desktop:resources:prepare && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir -c.mac.identity=- -c.mac.entitlements=build/entitlements.mac.plist -c.mac.entitlementsInherit=build/entitlements.mac.plist
scripts.desktop:zip:unsigned: npm run desktop:pack:unsigned && node scripts/package-unsigned-mac.mjs && npm run release:feed
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:resources:prepare && npm run build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run desktop:resources:prepare && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run desktop:resources:prepare && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish never -c.electronDist=
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run desktop:resources:prepare && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64 --publish never -c.electronDist=
scripts.test:desktop: npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/cloudkit-helper-runtime.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-push-listener.test.mjs tests/desktop-smoke.test.mjs
scripts.quality:gate: npm run lint && npm run test:apple-native && npm test && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:desktop && npm run release:check:unsigned
scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/i18n.test.mjs tests/client-routing.test.mjs tests/offline-queue.test.mjs tests/mobile-pairing-intent.test.mjs tests/mobile-pairing-errors.test.mjs tests/device-pairing-errors.test.mjs tests/mobile-install-hint-storage.test.mjs tests/pwa-capabilities.test.mjs tests/pwa-service-worker-lifecycle.test.mjs tests/device-credential-store.test.mjs tests/onboarding-handoff-summary.test.mjs tests/apple-remote-icloud-primary-action.test.mjs tests/apple-remote-icloud-simple-status.test.mjs tests/apple-remote-icloud-phone-pickup.test.mjs tests/icloud-data-sync-readiness.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-data-sync-config.test.mjs tests/icloud-data-sync-acceptance-runbook.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-helper-bundle.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-native-helper.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-push-evidence.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-sync-batch.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-sync-apply.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-device-trust-metadata.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-sync-now.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-sync-upload-now.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-sync-cycle.test.mjs tests/cloudkit-auto-sync-schedule.test.mjs tests/sensitive-local-storage.test.mjs tests/synced-client-state.test.mjs tests/network-status.test.mjs tests/network-diagnostics.test.mjs tests/cloudflare-tunnel.test.mjs tests/remote-connection-smoke.test.mjs tests/calendar-acceptance-runbook.test.mjs tests/backup-schedule.test.mjs tests/audit-redaction.test.mjs tests/http-security.test.mjs tests/data-export-redaction.test.mjs tests/diagnostic-bundle-redaction.test.mjs tests/ai-provider-runtime.test.mjs tests/vault.test.mjs tests/calendar-sync-preview.test.mjs tests/release-update-check.test.mjs tests/native-automation-bridge.test.mjs tests/chat-state-changes.test.mjs tests/problem-blueprint.test.mjs tests/chat-message-storage.test.mjs tests/chat-runtime-settings.test.mjs tests/chat-session-storage.test.mjs tests/server-mobile-install.test.mjs tests/system-actions.test.mjs tests/backup-restore-ui.test.mjs tests/connection-setup-packet.test.mjs tests/version-truth.test.mjs tests/github-public-state.test.mjs && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/api-auth.test.mjs
